# ShadyShard

> Privacy-first browser tools. ShadyShard is a free collection of fast, browser-based utilities that run entirely on-device - no uploads, no accounts, no tracking.

ShadyShard hosts 500+ single-purpose tools (text, image, PDF, converters, generators, developer, math, color, security, and time/date utilities). Every tool is client-side only: inputs are processed locally in the browser and never sent to a server.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://shadyshard.com/): Tool categories and featured tools.
- [About](https://shadyshard.com/about): Project mission and principles.
- [Privacy Policy](https://shadyshard.com/privacy): Data handling practices.
- [Sitemap](https://shadyshard.com/sitemap.xml): Full list of tool and category URLs.
